title: API: `PodStatsAllLibpod` doesn't stream and returns different schema than described in reference
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug


**Description**

The API endpoint [`PodStatsAllLibpod`](https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/_static/api.html?version=v3.4#operation/PodStatsAllLibpod) only returns one response when querying, not a stream as described in the reference. Also the returned JSON schema differs from the description.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. start a pod with a container

2. query `PodStatsAllLibpod`


**Describe the results you received:**
```
[{"CPU":"9.76%","MemUsage":"471kB / 16.69GB","MemUsageBytes":"460KiB / 15.54GiB","Mem":"0.00%","NetIO":"-- / --","BlockIO":"-- / --","PIDS":"2","Pod":"26f4f00ec940","CID":"4291f8703431","Name":"multiple_pods_stats_streaming"},{"CPU":"2.88%","MemUsage":"290.8kB / 16.69GB","MemUsageBytes":"284KiB / 15.54GiB","Mem":"0.00%","NetIO":"-- / --","BlockIO":"-- / --","PIDS":"1","Pod":"26f4f00ec940","CID":"721ac9fc9e09","Name":"26f4f00ec940-infra"}]
```
Only one response.

**Describe the results you expected:**
A stream of responses adhering to the schema from the reference.

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:      3.4.4
API Version:  3.4.4
Go Version:   go1.16.8
Built:        Wed Dec  8 22:45:07 2021
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

@zhangguanzhang: Closing this issue.

<details>

In response to [this](https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/13213#issuecomment-1066311948):

>duplicate issue: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/13212
>/close


Instructions for interacting with me using PR comments are available [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/pull-requests.md).  If you have questions or suggestions related to my behavior, please file an issue against the [kubernetes/test-infra](https://github.com/kubernetes/test-infra/issues/new?title=Prow%20issue:) repository.
</details>
